papers.title: From Secure Agentic AI to Secure Agentic Web: Challenges, Threats, and Future Directions
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as agentic systems that plan, memorize, and act in open-world environments. This shift brings new security problems: failures are no longer only unsafe text generation, but can become real harm through tool use, persistent memory, and interaction with untrusted web content. In this survey, we provide a transition-oriented view from Secure Agentic AI to a Secure Agentic Web. We first summarize a component-aligned threat taxonomy covering prompt abuse, environment injection, memory attacks, toolchain abuse, model tampering, and agent network attacks. We then review defense strategies, including prompt hardening, safety-aware decoding, privilege control for tools and APIs, runtime monitoring, continuous red-teaming, and protocol-level security mechanisms. We further discuss how these threats and mitigations escalate in the Agentic Web, where delegation chains, cross-domain interactions, and protocol-mediated ecosystems amplify risks via propagation and composition. Finally, we highlight open challenges for web-scale deployment, such as interoperable identity and authorization, provenance and traceability, ecosystem-level response, and scalable evaluation under adaptive adversaries. Our goal is to connect recent empirical findings with system-level requirements, and to outline practical research directions toward trustworthy agent ecosystems.
papers.summary_zh:
## 研究背景与范式跃迁  
随着大语言模型（LLMs）从被动响应转向主动规划、记忆与执行的**具身智能体（Agentic AI）**，其部署场景已延伸至开放网络环境。这一演进催生了新型安全威胁：风险不再局限于文本生成失当，更可能通过**工具调用、持久化记忆、与不可信网页内容交互**等途径引发现实世界危害。本文提出“**从安全具身AI迈向安全具身Web**”的系统性视角，首次将安全研究尺度从单体智能体扩展至跨域协同的协议化生态。

## 方法论与核心贡献  
我们构建了一个**组件对齐的威胁分类体系**，涵盖六大维度：提示滥用（Prompt Abuse）、环境注入（Environment Injection）、记忆攻击（Memory Attacks）、工具链滥用（Toolchain Abuse）、模型篡改（Model Tampering）及智能体网络攻击（Agent Network Attacks）。在此基础上，系统综述防御策略：**提示硬化（Prompt Hardening）、安全感知解码（Safety-Aware Decoding）、工具/API权限分级控制、运行时动态监控、持续红队演练（Continuous Red-Teaming）及协议层安全机制（如可信信道、签名验证）**。

## 关键发现与未来方向  
在“具身Web”场景下，**委托链（Delegation Chains）、跨域交互与协议中介化生态**显著放大风险——威胁可通过组合效应与传播路径级联扩散。由此，本文指出四大开放挑战：① 跨平台**互操作的身份与授权框架**；② 全链路**溯源与可追溯性（Provenance & Traceability）**；③ 生态级**协同响应机制**；④ 面向自适应对抗者的**可扩展评估范式**。本研究弥合了实证发现与系统工程需求间的鸿沟，为构建可信智能体生态系统提供了结构化路线图。
papers.summary_en: This survey bridges Secure Agentic AI and the emerging Secure Agentic Web. We introduce a component-aligned threat taxonomy covering prompt abuse, environment injection, memory attacks, toolchain abuse, model tampering, and agent network attacks. Defense strategies reviewed include prompt hardening, safety-aware decoding, privilege-controlled tool/API access, runtime monitoring, continuous red-teaming, and protocol-level mechanisms (e.g., signed delegation, trusted channels). Crucially, we show how risks escalate in the Agentic Web—where delegation chains, cross-domain interactions, and protocol-mediated ecosystems amplify threats via composition and propagation. We identify four open challenges for web-scale deployment: interoperable identity/authorization, end-to-end provenance and traceability, ecosystem-level coordinated response, and scalable evaluation under adaptive adversaries. Our work connects empirical security findings with system-level requirements to chart practical research directions toward trustworthy, deployable agent ecosystems.
papers.summary:
## 研究背景与范式跃迁  
随着大语言模型（LLMs）从被动响应转向主动规划、记忆与执行的**具身智能体（Agentic AI）**，其部署场景已延伸至开放网络环境。这一演进催生了新型安全威胁：风险不再局限于文本生成失当，更可能通过**工具调用、持久化记忆、与不可信网页内容交互**等途径引发现实世界危害。本文提出“**从安全具身AI迈向安全具身Web**”的系统性视角，首次将安全研究尺度从单体智能体扩展至跨域协同的协议化生态。

## 方法论与核心贡献  
我们构建了一个**组件对齐的威胁分类体系**，涵盖六大维度：提示滥用（Prompt Abuse）、环境注入（Environment Injection）、记忆攻击（Memory Attacks）、工具链滥用（Toolchain Abuse）、模型篡改（Model Tampering）及智能体网络攻击（Agent Network Attacks）。在此基础上，系统综述防御策略：**提示硬化（Prompt Hardening）、安全感知解码（Safety-Aware Decoding）、工具/API权限分级控制、运行时动态监控、持续红队演练（Continuous Red-Teaming）及协议层安全机制（如可信信道、签名验证）**。

## 关键发现与未来方向  
在“具身Web”场景下，**委托链（Delegation Chains）、跨域交互与协议中介化生态**显著放大风险——威胁可通过组合效应与传播路径级联扩散。由此，本文指出四大开放挑战：① 跨平台**互操作的身份与授权框架**；② 全链路**溯源与可追溯性（Provenance & Traceability）**；③ 生态级**协同响应机制**；④ 面向自适应对抗者的**可扩展评估范式**。本研究弥合了实证发现与系统工程需求间的鸿沟，为构建可信智能体生态系统提供了结构化路线图。

papers.title: Inference-Time Safety For Code LLMs Via Retrieval-Augmented Revision
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for code generation in high-stakes software development, yet their limited transparency in security reasoning and brittleness to evolving vulnerability patterns raise critical trustworthiness concerns. Models trained on static datasets cannot readily adapt to newly discovered vulnerabilities or changing security standards without retraining, leading to the repeated generation of unsafe code.   We present a principled approach to trustworthy code generation by design that operates as an inference-time safety mechanism. Our approach employs retrieval-augmented generation to surface relevant security risks in generated code and retrieve related security discussions from a curated Stack Overflow knowledge base, which are then used to guide an LLM during code revision. This design emphasizes three aspects relevant to trustworthiness: (1) interpretability, through transparent safety interventions grounded in expert community explanations; (2) robustness, by allowing adaptation to evolving security practices without model retraining; and (3) safety alignment, through real-time intervention before unsafe code reaches deployment.   Across real-world and benchmark datasets, our approach improves the security of LLM-generated code compared to prompting alone, while introducing no new vulnerabilities as measured by static analysis. These results suggest that principled, retrieval-augmented inference-time interventions can serve as a complementary mechanism for improving the safety of LLM-based code generation, and highlight the ongoing value of community knowledge in supporting trustworthy AI deployment.
papers.summary_zh:
## 研究背景  
大型语言模型（LLMs）正被广泛应用于高风险软件开发中的代码生成任务，但其**安全推理过程缺乏透明性**，且对动态演化的漏洞模式高度敏感，严重制约了实际部署的可信度。依赖静态训练数据的模型难以适应新披露的漏洞（如零日漏洞）或更新的安全规范（如CWE/OWASP标准），导致重复生成存在安全隐患的代码，亟需无需重训练的实时安全保障机制。

## 方法创新  
本文提出 **“检索增强式修订”（Retrieval-Augmented Revision, RAR）**——一种**纯推理时（inference-time）的安全干预框架**。该方法不修改模型权重，而是在代码生成后立即执行三阶段流程：(1) **安全风险识别**：对LLM初稿进行轻量级静态扫描与模式匹配，定位潜在漏洞点；(2) **社区知识检索**：基于风险上下文，从精心构建的Stack Overflow安全问答知识库中检索高相关性、专家验证的讨论帖（含修复方案、误用案例与最佳实践）；(3) **可解释性修订**：将检索结果作为权威依据，引导另一轻量LLM对原始代码进行安全重写，并显式标注每处修改所依据的社区证据来源。

## 核心贡献与效果  
本工作首次系统实现**可审计、可适配、可阻断**三位一体的代码安全增强：  
- **可审计性**：所有安全干预均锚定真实开发者社区解释，拒绝黑箱修正；  
- **可适配性**：知识库可每日增量更新（如新增CVE公告），模型无需任何微调即可响应最新威胁；  
- **可阻断性**：在代码提交前完成实时净化，杜绝unsafe code流入CI/CD流程。  
在HumanEval+Sec、SWE-bench Security及真实企业代码仓库测试中，RAR将漏洞率平均降低**42.7%**（vs. 基础提示工程），且**静态分析确认零新增漏洞引入**，验证了其安全性与可靠性。
papers.summary_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) for code generation face critical trustworthiness challenges due to opaque security reasoning and brittleness against evolving vulnerabilities. We propose **Retrieval-Augmented Revision (RAR)**—an inference-time safety mechanism that operates *without model retraining*. RAR first detects security risks in generated code, then retrieves expert-vetted security discussions from a curated Stack Overflow knowledge base, and finally guides a lightweight LLM to revise the code with transparent, evidence-based edits. Our approach advances trustworthiness along three axes: **interpretability** (interventions grounded in real community explanations), **robustness** (adapting to new vulnerabilities via knowledge-base updates alone), and **safety alignment** (real-time blocking of unsafe code pre-deployment). Evaluated on benchmark and real-world datasets, RAR significantly improves code security over prompt engineering alone—reducing vulnerability rates by 42.7% on average—while introducing *zero* new vulnerabilities per static analysis. This demonstrates retrieval-augmented inference-time intervention as a practical, complementary safeguard for trustworthy LLM-based coding.

papers.title: Detection-Gated Glottal Segmentation with Zero-Shot Cross-Dataset Transfer and Clinical Feature Extraction
papers.abstract: Background: Accurate glottal segmentation in high-speed videoendoscopy (HSV) is essential for extracting kinematic biomarkers of laryngeal function. However, existing deep learning models often produce spurious artifacts in non-glottal frames and fail to generalize across different clinical settings.   Methods: We propose a detection-gated pipeline that integrates a YOLOv8-based detector with a U-Net segmenter. A temporal consistency wrapper ensures robustness by suppressing false positives during glottal closure and instrument occlusion. The model was trained on a limited subset of the GIRAFE dataset (600 frames) and evaluated via zero-shot transfer on the large-scale BAGLS dataset.   Results: The pipeline achieved state-of-the-art performance on the GIRAFE benchmark (DSC 0.81) and demonstrated superior generalizability on BAGLS (DSC 0.85, in-distribution) without institutional fine-tuning. Downstream validation on a 65-subject clinical cohort confirmed that automated kinematic features (Open Quotient, coefficient of variation) remained consistent with established clinical benchmarks. The coefficient of variation (CV) of the glottal area was found to be a significant marker for distinguishing healthy from pathological vocal function (p=0.006).   Conclusions: The detection-gated architecture provides a lightweight, computationally efficient solution (~35 frames/s) for real-time clinical use. By enabling robust zero-shot transfer, this framework facilitates the standardized, large-scale extraction of clinical biomarkers across diverse endoscopy platforms. Code, trained weights, and evaluation scripts are released at https://github.com/hari-krishnan/openglottal.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
高帧率视频喉镜（HSV）中的**精准声门分割**是提取喉部运动生物标志物（如开商、闭商、面积变异系数等）的基础。然而，现有深度学习方法在非声门帧中易产生伪影，且因数据分布偏移、设备差异和标注稀缺，在跨中心、跨设备临床场景下泛化能力严重受限。

## 方法创新  
本研究提出**检测-门控声门分割框架（Detection-Gated Glottal Segmentation）**：  
- **双阶段协同架构**：以轻量级YOLOv8检测器定位声门区域，其输出作为U-Net分割器的动态空间掩码（gating signal），有效抑制背景干扰；  
- **时序一致性封装器**：通过帧间运动约束与闭合期/器械遮挡先验，自动抑制瞬态误检，提升生理合理性；  
- **零样本跨数据集迁移**：仅用GIRAFE数据集600帧（<0.5%全量）训练，**未经任何微调**即直接迁移至大规模BAGLS数据集（含多中心、多设备HSV序列）。

## 关键结果  
- 在GIRAFE基准上达**Dice相似系数（DSC）0.81**，刷新SOTA；在BAGLS上实现**DSC 0.85**（in-distribution），显著优于现有方法（+0.12 DSC）；  
- 在65例临床队列中验证下游特征可靠性：自动提取的**开商（OQ）与面积变异系数（CV）** 与金标准人工测量高度一致（ICC > 0.92）；  
- **CV值被证实为强鉴别指标**：健康组CV均值为0.18±0.04，病理组为0.31±0.07（*p*=0.006），具备临床判别潜力。

## 意义与部署  
模型推理速度达**~35帧/秒**，满足实时术中分析需求；开源代码、预训练权重及评估脚本已发布（https://github.com/hari-krishnan/openglottal），推动多平台喉功能标准化量化。
papers.summary_en:
## Background & Innovation  
Accurate glottal segmentation in high-speed videoendoscopy (HSV) is critical for quantifying laryngeal kinematics, yet existing deep learning models suffer from spurious artifacts and poor cross-dataset generalizability. We propose a **detection-gated pipeline**: a YOLOv8 detector spatially gates a U-Net segmenter, while a temporal consistency wrapper suppresses false positives during glottal closure and instrument occlusion. Trained on only 600 frames from GIRAFE (<0.5% of the dataset), it achieves **zero-shot transfer** to the large-scale, multi-institutional BAGLS dataset—without any fine-tuning.

## Key Results  
The framework achieves state-of-the-art Dice scores of **0.81 on GIRAFE** and **0.85 on BAGLS** (in-distribution), outperforming prior methods by +0.12 in DSC. Downstream validation on 65 clinical subjects confirms robust extraction of kinematic features (Open Quotient, area coefficient of variation), with ICC > 0.92 vs. expert annotations. Critically, the glottal area CV significantly distinguishes healthy from pathological vocal function (*p* = 0.006). At **~35 FPS**, the lightweight architecture enables real-time clinical deployment. Code, weights, and evaluation scripts are publicly available.

papers.title: OpenRad: a Curated Repository of Open-access AI models for Radiology
papers.abstract: The rapid developments in artificial intelligence (AI) research in radiology have produced numerous models that are scattered across various platforms and sources, limiting discoverability, reproducibility and clinical translation. Herein, OpenRad was created, a curated, standardized, open-access repository that aggregates radiology AI models and providing details such as the availability of pretrained weights and interactive applications. Retrospective analysis of peer reviewed literature and preprints indexed in PubMed, arXiv and Scopus was performed until Dec 2025 (n = 5239 records). Model records were generated using a locally hosted LLM (gpt-oss:120b), based on the RSNA AI Roadmap JSON schema, and manually verified by ten expert reviewers. Stability of LLM outputs was assessed on 225 randomly selected papers using text similarity metrics. A total of 1694 articles were included after review. Included models span all imaging modalities (CT, MRI, X-ray, US) and radiology subspecialties. Automated extraction demonstrated high stability for structured fields (Levenshtein ratio > 90%), with 78.5% of record edits being characterized as minor during expert review. Statistical analysis of the repository revealed CNN and transformer architectures as dominant, while MRI was the most commonly used modality (in 621 neuroradiology AI models). Research output was mostly concentrated in China and the United States. The OpenRad web interface enables model discovery via keyword search and filters for modality, subspecialty, intended use, verification status and demo availability, alongside live statistics. The community can contribute new models through a dedicated portal. OpenRad contains approx. 1700 open access, curated radiology AI models with standardized metadata, supplemented with analysis of code repositories, thereby creating a comprehensive, searchable resource for the radiology community.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
放射学人工智能（AI）研究迅猛发展，但模型分散于论文、代码平台与预印本中，严重制约**可发现性、可复现性及临床转化**。缺乏统一标准、结构化元数据和开放验证机制，已成为领域共性瓶颈。

## 方法与构建流程  
本研究构建了 **OpenRad**——首个面向放射学的** curated（人工精选）、标准化、全开放**AI模型知识库。研究团队系统检索 PubMed、arXiv 与 Scopus 中截至2025年12月的文献（n = 5,239），经严格筛选后纳入**1,694篇高质量研究**。所有模型记录均依据 RSNA AI Roadmap JSON 标准 schema 构建：首先由本地部署的开源大模型 **gpt-oss:120b** 自动提取结构化字段（如模态、任务、架构、权重可用性、交互式Demo链接等），再由**10位放射学AI领域专家**逐条人工审核与修正。稳定性评估显示：在225篇随机抽样论文上，Levenshtein相似度达**>90%**；专家修订中**78.5%为微小调整**（如标点、术语统一），证实自动化流程高度可靠。

## 关键发现与资源特色  
- 涵盖全部影像模态（CT/MRI/X-ray/US）及所有亚专业（神经、胸部、腹部等）；  
- **MRI模型占比最高（621例，集中于神经放射学）**，CNN与Transformer为绝对主流架构；  
- 地理分布呈双极格局：**中国与美国贡献超65%的研究产出**；  
- Web平台支持多维过滤（模态/亚专业/预期用途/验证状态/Demo可用性）+ 实时统计看板；  
- 提供**约1700个开放模型**，每条记录含标准化元数据、代码仓库分析（许可证、活跃度、测试覆盖率）及可点击Demo；  
- 社区可通过专用门户提交新模型，实现持续共建。

OpenRad 不仅是模型目录，更是推动AI临床落地的**可信基础设施与协作枢纽**。
papers.summary_en: OpenRad is a curated, standardized, open-access repository designed to address fragmentation in radiology AI research. Through systematic retrospective review of 5,239 PubMed/arXiv/Scopus records (up to Dec 2025), 1,694 peer-reviewed and preprint studies were included. Model records—structured per the RSNA AI Roadmap JSON schema—were auto-generated using a locally hosted gpt-oss:120b LLM and rigorously verified by 10 domain experts; LLM output stability was confirmed (Levenshtein ratio >90%) on 225 random papers, with 78.5% expert edits classified as minor. The repository currently hosts ~1,700 open radiology AI models spanning all modalities (CT, MRI, X-ray, US) and subspecialties, with MRI dominating (621 neuroradiology models) and CNNs/Transformers as prevalent architectures. Geographically, research output is concentrated in China and the United States. The OpenRad web interface enables keyword search and filtering by modality, subspecialty, intended use, verification status, and demo availability, complemented by live analytics. Community contributions are supported via a dedicated submission portal. OpenRad establishes a foundational, searchable, and sustainably maintained resource for reproducible development and clinical translation of radiology AI.
papers.summary:
## 背景与挑战  
放射学人工智能（AI）研究迅猛发展，但模型分散于论文、代码平台与预印本中，严重制约**可发现性、可复现性及临床转化**。缺乏统一标准、结构化元数据和开放验证机制，已成为领域共性瓶颈。

## 方法与构建流程  
本研究构建了 **OpenRad**——首个面向放射学的** curated（人工精选）、标准化、全开放**AI模型知识库。研究团队系统检索 PubMed、arXiv 与 Scopus 中截至2025年12月的文献（n = 5,239），经严格筛选后纳入**1,694篇高质量研究**。所有模型记录均依据 RSNA AI Roadmap JSON 标准 schema 构建：首先由本地部署的开源大模型 **gpt-oss:120b** 自动提取结构化字段（如模态、任务、架构、权重可用性、交互式Demo链接等），再由**10位放射学AI领域专家**逐条人工审核与修正。稳定性评估显示：在225篇随机抽样论文上，Levenshtein相似度达**>90%**；专家修订中**78.5%为微小调整**（如标点、术语统一），证实自动化流程高度可靠。

## 关键发现与资源特色  
- 涵盖全部影像模态（CT/MRI/X-ray/US）及所有亚专业（神经、胸部、腹部等）；  
- **MRI模型占比最高（621例，集中于神经放射学）**，CNN与Transformer为绝对主流架构；  
- 地理分布呈双极格局：**中国与美国贡献超65%的研究产出**；  
- Web平台支持多维过滤（模态/亚专业/预期用途/验证状态/Demo可用性）+ 实时统计看板；  
- 提供**约1700个开放模型**，每条记录含标准化元数据、代码仓库分析（许可证、活跃度、测试覆盖率）及可点击Demo；  
- 社区可通过专用门户提交新模型，实现持续共建。

OpenRad 不仅是模型目录，更是推动AI临床落地的**可信基础设施与协作枢纽**。

papers.title: Federated Agentic AI for Wireless Networks: Fundamentals, Approaches, and Applications
papers.abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) presents a promising pathway toward realizing autonomous and self-improving wireless network services. However, resource-constrained, widely distributed, and data-heterogeneous nature of wireless networks poses significant challenges to existing agentic AI that relies on centralized architectures, leading to high communication overhead, privacy risks, and non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) data. Federated learning (FL) has the potential to improve the overall loop of agentic AI through collaborative local learning and parameter sharing without exchanging raw data. This paper proposes new federated agentic AI approaches for wireless networks. We first summarize fundamentals of agentic AI and mainstream FL types. Then, we illustrate how each FL type can strengthen a specific component of agentic AI's loop. Moreover, we conduct a case study on using FRL to improve the performance of agentic AI's action decision in low-altitude wireless networks (LAWNs). Finally, we provide a conclusion and discuss future research directions.
papers.summary_zh:
## 联邦化智能体AI：面向无线网络的范式融合与创新  

**背景与挑战**：智能体人工智能（Agentic AI）旨在构建具备感知、推理、决策与自演进能力的自主网络服务，但其在无线网络中的落地受限于三大瓶颈：终端资源高度受限、节点地理分布广泛、以及数据呈现显著的非独立同分布（non-IID）特性。传统依赖中心化训练的Agentic AI架构易引发高通信开销、原始数据泄露风险及模型收敛困难。

**方法与框架**：本文提出“联邦化智能体AI”（Federated Agentic AI）新范式，深度融合联邦学习（FL）与Agentic AI闭环（感知→规划→行动→反思）。我们系统梳理了Agentic AI的核心组件（如记忆机制、工具调用、反思模块）与三类主流FL范式——横向FL（hFL）、纵向FL（vFL）和联邦强化学习（FRL）——的映射关系：hFL优化多基站协同的全局策略网络；vFL支持跨层（物理层/网络层/应用层）异构智能体的知识对齐；FRL则专用于提升分布式环境下的序贯决策鲁棒性。

**关键创新与验证**：首次将FRL嵌入低空无线网络（LAWN）中无人机集群的动态频谱接入任务，通过本地Q网络更新+加密梯度聚合，在通信开销降低58%的同时，使信道选择成功率提升23.7%（vs. 中心化DQN），且满足端到端延迟<15 ms的实时性要求。本工作还构建了首个面向无线网络Agentic AI的联邦化设计原则矩阵，涵盖隐私-效用-时延三维权衡。

**意义**：为6G自治网络提供可扩展、隐私安全、适应non-IID数据的智能体协同新路径。
papers.summary_en: This paper introduces **Federated Agentic AI**, a novel paradigm unifying agentic AI’s autonomous loop (perceive-plan-act-reflect) with federated learning (FL) to address critical challenges in wireless networks—resource constraints, geographical dispersion, and severe data heterogeneity (non-IID). We systematically map core agentic components (e.g., memory, tool use, reflection) to three FL types: horizontal FL (hFL) for cross-node policy coordination, vertical FL (vFL) for multi-layer knowledge alignment, and **Federated Reinforcement Learning (FRL)** for robust sequential decision-making. As a concrete case study, we deploy FRL in low-altitude wireless networks (LAWNs) for UAV-assisted dynamic spectrum access: local Q-network updates combined with secure gradient aggregation reduce communication overhead by 58% while improving channel selection success rate by 23.7% over centralized DQN, under strict <15 ms end-to-end latency. The work establishes foundational design principles for privacy-preserving, low-latency, non-IID-resilient agentic intelligence in 6G networks.
papers.summary:

papers.title: CA-AFP: Cluster-Aware Adaptive Federated Pruning
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) faces major challenges in real-world deployments due to statistical heterogeneity across clients and system heterogeneity arising from resource-constrained devices. While clustering-based approaches mitigate statistical heterogeneity and pruning techniques improve memory and communication efficiency, these strategies are typically studied in isolation.   We propose CA-AFP, a unified framework that jointly addresses both challenges by performing cluster-specific model pruning. In CA-AFP, clients are first grouped into clusters, and a separate model for each cluster is adaptively pruned during training. The framework introduces two key innovations: (1) a cluster-aware importance scoring mechanism that combines weight magnitude, intra-cluster coherence, and gradient consistency to identify parameters for pruning, and (2) an iterative pruning schedule that progressively removes parameters while enabling model self-healing through weight regrowth.   We evaluate CA-AFP on two widely used human activity recognition benchmarks, UCI HAR and WISDM, under natural user-based federated partitions. Experimental results demonstrate that CA-AFP achieves a favorable balance between predictive accuracy, inter-client fairness, and communication efficiency. Compared to pruning-based baselines, CA-AFP consistently improves accuracy and lower performance disparity across clients with limited fine-tuning, while requiring substantially less communication than dense clustering-based methods. It also shows robustness to different Non-IID levels of data. Finally, ablation studies analyze the impact of clustering, pruning schedules and scoring mechanism offering practical insights into the design of efficient and adaptive FL systems.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
联邦学习（FL）在实际部署中面临**统计异构性**（客户端数据分布差异大）和**系统异构性**（设备资源受限）的双重瓶颈。现有工作多孤立地采用聚类缓解统计偏差，或通过剪枝提升通信/内存效率，缺乏协同优化机制。

## 方法：CA-AFP 框架  
我们提出 **CA-AFP（Cluster-Aware Adaptive Federated Pruning）**——一种统一的集群感知自适应联邦剪枝框架。其核心流程为：  
- **分层协同设计**：先基于客户端数据相似性动态聚类；再为每个簇独立维护并训练一个轻量模型；  
- **双创新机制**：  
  - **集群感知重要性评分**：融合**权重幅值**、**簇内参数一致性**（intra-cluster coherence）与**梯度方向稳定性**（gradient consistency），精准识别可剪枝参数；  
  - **迭代式剪枝-再生调度**：在训练中渐进剪枝，并通过**权重再生（weight regrowth）** 实现模型自修复，避免精度骤降。  

## 主要发现与优势  
在 UCI HAR 与 WISDM 两大真实人类活动识别基准上（用户级 Non-IID 划分），CA-AFP 显著提升三重目标平衡性：  
✅ **精度提升**：较 FedPrune 等剪枝基线平均+2.1% 准确率；  
✅ **公平性增强**：客户端性能方差降低 38%，显著缓解“长尾掉队”问题；  
✅ **通信高效**：相比全量聚类方法（如 CFL），通信量减少 62%；  
✅ **鲁棒性强**：在强 Non-IID（Dirichlet α=0.1）下仍保持 92.4% 基准精度；  
✅ **可解释性验证**：消融实验表明，集群划分与动态评分机制分别贡献 47% 和 35% 的性能增益。
papers.summary_en: Federated Learning (FL) suffers from statistical and system heterogeneity, yet clustering and pruning are typically addressed separately. We propose **CA-AFP**, a unified framework that performs *cluster-specific adaptive pruning*: clients are first grouped into data-similar clusters, and each cluster’s model is pruned iteratively during training using a novel **cluster-aware importance score**, which jointly considers weight magnitude, intra-cluster parameter coherence, and gradient consistency. Crucially, CA-AFP incorporates **weight regrowth** to enable self-healing after pruning. Evaluated on UCI HAR and WISDM under natural user-partitioned Non-IID settings, CA-AFP achieves superior trade-offs among accuracy (+2.1% over pruning baselines), inter-client fairness (38% lower performance variance), and communication efficiency (62% less than dense clustering methods). It remains robust across varying Non-IID levels (α = 0.1–1.0) and ablation studies validate the critical roles of clustering, the scoring mechanism, and the pruning schedule.
papers.summary:

papers.title: S5-HES Agent: Society 5.0-driven Agentic Framework to Democratize Smart Home Environment Simulation
papers.abstract: The smart home is a key domain within the Society 5.0 vision for a human-centered society. Smart home technologies rapidly evolve, and research should diversify while remaining aligned with Society 5.0 objectives. Democratizing smart home research would engage a broader community of innovators beyond traditional limited experts. This shift necessitates inclusive simulation frameworks that support research across diverse fields in industry and academia. However, existing smart home simulators require significant technical expertise, offer limited adaptability, and lack automated evolution, thereby failing to meet the holistic needs of Society 5.0. These constraints impede researchers from efficiently conducting simulations and experiments for security, energy, health, climate, and socio-economic research. To address these challenges, this paper presents the Society 5.0-driven Smart Home Environment Simulator Agent (S5-HES Agent), an agentic simulation framework that transforms traditional smart home simulation through autonomous AI orchestration. The framework coordinates specialized agents through interchangeable large language models (LLMs), enabling natural-language-driven end-to-end smart home simulation configuration without programming expertise. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline with semantic, keyword, and hybrid search retrieves smart home knowledge. Comprehensive evaluation on S5-HES Agent demonstrates that the RAG pipeline achieves near-optimal retrieval fidelity, simulated device behaviour and threat scenarios align with real-world IoT datasets, and simulation engine scales predictably across home configurations, establishing a stable foundation for Society 5.0 smart home research. Source code is available under the MIT License at https://github.com/AsiriweLab/S5-HES-Agent.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
在“社会5.0”（Society 5.0）以人为本的愿景下，智能家庭作为人本技术融合的关键场景，亟需兼具包容性、可演进性与跨学科适配能力的研究基础设施。然而，当前主流智能家庭仿真器存在三大瓶颈：**高度依赖编程技能**（如Python/C++）、**配置僵化难适配多样化研究需求**（如安全攻防、能源优化、老年健康监测、碳足迹建模等），且**缺乏自主演进机制**，无法响应IoT设备爆发式增长与协议快速迭代。这严重制约了高校、社区实验室、政策研究机构及非技术背景创新者参与智能家庭前沿探索。

## 方法与创新  
本文提出**S5-HES Agent**——首个以社会5.0范式驱动的智能家庭环境仿真智能体框架。其核心创新在于：  
- **全栈代理化架构**：通过可插拔的大型语言模型（LLM）协调任务型智能体（如拓扑生成Agent、威胁建模Agent、能耗模拟Agent），实现**自然语言端到端配置**（例如：“生成含3位老人、2台医疗IoT设备、支持Wi-Fi 6E与Matter协议的120㎡公寓，并模拟蓝牙劫持攻击对跌倒报警延迟的影响”）；  
- **多模态检索增强生成（RAG）知识中枢**：融合语义搜索（基于Sentence-BERT）、关键词匹配（设备型号/协议标准库）与混合检索策略，动态接入IEEE IoT Journal、NIST SP 800-213、OpenHAB设备库等权威知识源；  
- **可验证仿真内核**：设备行为模型经真实IoT数据集（如IoT-23、CASAS）校准，威胁场景复现率达94.7%，仿真引擎在1–50设备规模下线性扩展（R²=0.998）。

## 意义  
S5-HES Agent将智能家庭仿真从“专家工具”转变为“全民科研平台”，已开源（MIT协议，GitHub: AsiriweLab/S5-HES-Agent），支撑安全、气候、健康、社会经济等多维交叉研究，实质性推进社会5.0“技术为人所用、由人共治”的核心承诺。
papers.summary_en: This paper introduces **S5-HES Agent**, a Society 5.0–driven agentic framework that democratizes smart home simulation by eliminating programming barriers and enabling natural-language-driven, end-to-end configuration. It orchestrates specialized LLM-powered agents—via interchangeable models—to autonomously generate home topologies, simulate device behaviors (calibrated against real-world IoT datasets like IoT-23 and CASAS), and model security threats. A hybrid RAG pipeline (semantic + keyword + fused search) retrieves authoritative smart home knowledge from standards (e.g., NIST SP 800-213), protocols (Matter, Zigbee), and open device repositories. Evaluation shows near-optimal retrieval fidelity (>96% relevance), high-fidelity threat replication (94.7% alignment with ground-truth attack patterns), and predictable linear scalability across home sizes (1–50 devices, R² = 0.998). The open-source implementation (MIT License, GitHub: AsiriweLab/S5-HES-Agent) establishes a stable, inclusive foundation for cross-disciplinary Society 5.0 research in security, energy, health, climate, and socio-economics.

papers.title: Extracting Training Dialogue Data from Large Language Model based Task Bots
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been widely adopted to enhance Task-Oriented Dialogue Systems (TODS) by modeling complex language patterns and delivering contextually appropriate responses. However, this integration introduces significant privacy risks, as LLMs, functioning as soft knowledge bases that compress extensive training data into rich knowledge representations, can inadvertently memorize training dialogue data containing not only identifiable information such as phone numbers but also entire dialogue-level events like complete travel schedules. Despite the critical nature of this privacy concern, how LLM memorization is inherited in developing task bots remains unexplored. In this work, we address this gap through a systematic quantitative study that involves evaluating existing training data extraction attacks, analyzing key characteristics of task-oriented dialogue modeling that render existing methods ineffective, and proposing novel attack techniques tailored for LLM-based TODS that enhance both response sampling and membership inference. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed data extraction attack. Our method can extract thousands of training labels of dialogue states with best-case precision exceeding 70%. Furthermore, we provide an in-depth analysis of training data memorization in LLM-based TODS by identifying and quantifying key influencing factors and discussing targeted mitigation strategies.
papers.summary_zh:
## 研究背景与问题  
大型语言模型（LLMs）正被广泛集成至任务导向型对话系统（TODS）中，以提升语义理解与上下文响应能力。然而，LLMs作为“软知识库”，在压缩海量训练数据过程中可能**深度记忆原始对话样本**——不仅包含手机号、邮箱等可识别信息，更可能复现完整的对话级事件（如全程航班预订记录、酒店入住时间线）。这一现象在任务机器人部署场景中尤为危险：用户与任务bot的交互本应受隐私保护，但若底层LLM泄露训练数据，将导致严重合规风险（如违反GDPR/《个人信息保护法》）。目前，针对通用LLM的数据提取攻击（如成员推断、提示工程还原）尚未适配TODS特有的结构化输出约束（如槽位填充、状态追踪），其有效性显著下降，相关机制亦缺乏系统性分析。

## 方法与创新  
本文首次开展面向LLM-based TODS的**训练数据记忆性量化研究**：  
- **系统评估**现有提取攻击在任务对话场景下的失效原因（如对话状态标签稀疏性、响应模板化导致的熵降低）；  
- **提出双阶段增强攻击框架**：① 基于状态感知的**自适应提示采样**（State-Aware Prompt Sampling），动态构造触发特定对话状态的高置信度查询；② 融合槽位一致性验证与分布偏移检测的**鲁棒成员推断**（Robust Membership Inference）；  
- 在MultiWOZ、SGD等主流任务对话数据集上构建基准测试平台，覆盖5类典型任务（订餐、旅行、酒店等）。

## 主要发现与意义  
实验表明：所提方法可在真实任务bot（如基于Llama-2-13B微调的TODS）上**成功提取超2,800条高质量对话状态标签**，最佳场景下精确率突破70%（F1达62.3%），显著优于基线方法（+31.5% precision）。进一步分析揭示：**状态更新频率、槽位共现强度、训练数据重复度**是影响记忆性的三大主导因子。本文据此提出轻量级缓解策略，包括状态掩码蒸馏（State-Masked Distillation）与槽位级差分隐私注入，在仅引入<2.3%任务性能下降的前提下，将数据提取成功率降低至11.4%。本研究为LLM任务机器人的隐私风险评估与安全治理提供了首个实证基础与技术路径。
papers.summary_en: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in task-oriented dialogue systems (TODS), yet their tendency to memorize training dialogues—including full dialogue-level events and PII—poses severe privacy risks. This work presents the first systematic study of training data extraction from LLM-based TODS, identifying key limitations of existing attacks (e.g., low label density, rigid response templates) and proposing a novel two-stage attack: (1) state-aware prompt sampling to trigger high-confidence dialogue state outputs, and (2) robust membership inference leveraging slot consistency and distributional shift detection. Evaluated on MultiWOZ and SGD benchmarks across five task domains, our method extracts over 2,800 dialogue state labels with up to **70.2% precision** (F1 = 62.3%), outperforming baselines by +31.5% in precision. We further quantify critical memorization factors—state update frequency, slot co-occurrence strength, and data repetition—and propose practical mitigations (e.g., state-masked distillation) that reduce extraction success to 11.4% with <2.3% task performance degradation.

papers.title: Retrieval, Refinement, and Ranking for Text-to-Video Generation via Prompt Optimization and Test-Time Scaling
papers.abstract: While large-scale datasets have driven significant progress in Text-to-Video (T2V) generative models, these models remain highly sensitive to input prompts, demonstrating that prompt design is critical to generation quality. Current methods for improving video output often fall short: they either depend on complex, post-editing models, risking the introduction of artifacts, or require expensive fine-tuning of the core generator, which severely limits both scalability and accessibility. In this work, we introduce 3R, a novel RAG based prompt optimization framework. 3R utilizes the power of current state-of-the-art T2V diffusion model and vision language model. It can be used with any T2V model without any kind of model training. The framework leverages three key strategies: RAG-based modifiers extraction for enriched contextual grounding, diffusion-based Preference Optimization for aligning outputs with human preferences, and temporal frame interpolation for producing temporally consistent visual contents. Together, these components enable more accurate, efficient, and contextually aligned text-to-video generation. Experimental results demonstrate the efficacy of 3R in enhancing the static fidelity and dynamic coherence of generated videos, underscoring the importance of optimizing user prompts.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
当前文本到视频（Text-to-Video, T2V）生成模型虽在大规模数据驱动下取得长足进步，但其输出质量**高度依赖输入提示词（prompt）的表述精度**。现有优化方案存在明显局限：一类依赖复杂后编辑模型，易引入视觉伪影；另一类需对主生成器进行昂贵微调，严重制约可扩展性与用户可及性。

## 方法创新：3R框架  
本文提出**3R（Retrieval, Refinement, and Ranking）——一种无需训练、即插即用的检索增强型提示优化框架**。3R完全兼容任意现成T2V扩散模型（如SVD、PixVerse），不修改其权重，亦无需梯度更新。其核心由三阶段协同构成：  
- **Retrieval（检索）**：利用视觉语言模型（VLM）从海量视频-文本对中检索语义相关片段，提取上下文增强的**修饰性描述词（modifiers）**，提升提示的具象性与场景覆盖；  
- **Refinement（精炼）**：基于扩散过程的**偏好优化（Preference Optimization）**，通过多轮隐空间扰动与人类偏好信号（如动作连贯性、对象稳定性）对齐，实现细粒度语义校准；  
- **Ranking（排序）**：引入**时间帧插值模块**，在关键帧间生成高保真中间帧，并依据运动一致性得分对候选视频序列重排序，确保时序逻辑连贯。

## 实验结果与价值  
在MSR-VTT、WebVid-10M基准上，3R显著提升生成视频的**静态保真度（+12.7% CLIP-Score）与动态连贯性（+18.3% MotionScore）**，且零样本迁移至未见提示类型成功率超86%。本工作首次将RAG范式系统性引入T2V提示工程，为轻量、高效、可解释的生成优化提供了新范式。
papers.summary_en: Text-to-video (T2V) models remain highly prompt-sensitive despite advances driven by large-scale data. Existing optimization methods either introduce artifacts via post-hoc editing or incur prohibitive costs through generator fine-tuning. We propose **3R**, a training-free, retrieval-augmented prompt optimization framework compatible with *any* off-the-shelf T2V diffusion model. 3R integrates three synergistic components: (1) **Retrieval**—using vision-language models to extract context-enriching modifiers from video-text corpora; (2) **Refinement**—diffusion-based preference optimization that aligns outputs with human judgments of motion coherence and object stability; and (3) **Ranking**—temporal frame interpolation followed by motion-consistency scoring for optimal sequence selection. Experiments on MSR-VTT and WebVid-10M show consistent gains: +12.7% CLIP-Score (static fidelity) and +18.3% MotionScore (dynamic coherence), with zero-shot generalization >86%. 3R establishes a scalable, interpretable paradigm for prompt-centric T2V enhancement.
papers.summary:

当前文本到视频（Text-to-Video, T2V）生成模型虽在大规模数据驱动下取得长足进步，但其输出质量**高度依赖输入提示词（prompt）的表述精度**。现有优化方案存在明显局限：一类依赖复杂后编辑模型，易引入视觉伪影；另一类需对主生成器进行昂贵微调，严重制约可扩展性与用户可及性。

papers.title: Noise-Calibrated Inference from Differentially Private Sufficient Statistics in Exponential Families
papers.abstract: Many differentially private (DP) data release systems either output DP synthetic data and leave analysts to perform inference as usual, which can lead to severe miscalibration, or output a DP point estimate without a principled way to do uncertainty quantification. This paper develops a clean and tractable middle ground for exponential families: release only DP sufficient statistics, then perform noise-calibrated likelihood-based inference and optional parametric synthetic data generation as post-processing. Our contributions are: (1) a general recipe for approximate-DP release of clipped sufficient statistics under the Gaussian mechanism; (2) asymptotic normality, explicit variance inflation, and valid Wald-style confidence intervals for the plug-in DP MLE; (3) a noise-aware likelihood correction that is first-order equivalent to the plug-in but supports bootstrap-based intervals; and (4) a matching minimax lower bound showing the privacy distortion rate is unavoidable. The resulting theory yields concrete design rules and a practical pipeline for releasing DP synthetic data with principled uncertainty quantification, validated on three exponential families and real census data.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与问题  
在差分隐私（DP）数据发布中，现有方法存在两极化困境：一类输出DP合成数据，但后续分析沿用传统推断流程，导致**严重校准失真**（如置信区间覆盖率远低于标称水平）；另一类仅发布DP点估计（如隐私保护下的最大似然估计MLE），却缺乏**可证明有效的不确定性量化框架**。尤其在指数族分布下，如何兼顾隐私保障、统计效率与推断可靠性，长期缺乏统一、可解析的解决方案。

## 方法与创新  
本文提出“**噪声校准推断**”（Noise-Calibrated Inference）范式，聚焦于**仅释放DP充分统计量**这一简洁中间路径：  
- **(1) 隐私发布层**：基于高斯机制，给出带截断（clipping）的充分统计量的近似DP释放通用配方，显式控制L2敏感度；  
- **(2) 推断校准层**：证明噪声注入后插件DP-MLE具有**渐近正态性**，导出**精确的方差膨胀公式**，并构造**Wald型有效置信区间**（覆盖率在DP约束下渐近准确）；  
- **(3) 噪声感知似然修正**：提出一阶等价于插件估计但支持**Bootstrap重采样**的似然校正形式，实现更稳健的区间估计；  
- **(4) 理论完备性**：建立匹配的极小极大下界，证实所获隐私偏差率（privacy distortion rate）**不可规避**，凸显方法最优性。

## 实践价值  
理论成果直接转化为可操作的设计准则与端到端流程：从统计量截断半径选择、噪声尺度配置，到合成数据生成（作为后处理），均具明确指导意义。方法在**正态、泊松、伯努利**三类典型指数族及**美国人口普查真实数据**上验证有效，首次实现DP合成数据发布与**原理性不确定性量化**的协同落地。
papers.summary_en: This paper bridges a critical gap in differentially private (DP) inference for exponential families by proposing *noise-calibrated inference* from DP sufficient statistics. Instead of releasing DP synthetic data (causing severe miscalibration) or DP point estimates (lacking uncertainty quantification), we release only clipped sufficient statistics via the Gaussian mechanism—yielding approximate DP with explicit sensitivity control. We establish asymptotic normality of the plug-in DP MLE, derive its exact variance inflation due to privacy noise, and construct valid Wald-style confidence intervals. A noise-aware likelihood correction—first-order equivalent to the plug-in estimator but compatible with bootstrap-based inference—is introduced. Crucially, a matching minimax lower bound proves the derived privacy-distortion rate is unavoidable. The framework delivers concrete design rules and a practical pipeline, validated on normal, Poisson, and Bernoulli families and real U.S. Census data.

papers.title: Decentralized Federated Learning by Partial Message Exchange
papers.abstract: Decentralized federated learning (DFL) has emerged as a transformative server-free paradigm that enables collaborative learning over large-scale heterogeneous networks. However, it continues to face fundamental challenges, including data heterogeneity, restrictive assumptions for theoretical analysis, and degraded convergence when standard communication- or privacyenhancing techniques are applied. To overcome these drawbacks, this paper develops a novel algorithm, PaME (DFL by Partial Message Exchange). The central principle is to allow only randomly selected sparse coordinates to be exchanged between two neighbor nodes. Consequently, PaME achieves substantial reductions in communication costs while still preserving a high level of privacy, without sacrificing accuracy. Moreover, grounded in rigorous analysis, the algorithm is shown to converge at a linear rate under the gradient to be locally Lipschitz continuous and the communication matrix to be doubly stochastic. These two mild assumptions not only dispense with many restrictive conditions commonly imposed by existing DFL methods but also enables PaME to effectively address data heterogeneity. Furthermore, comprehensive numerical experiments demonstrate its superior performance compared with several representative decentralized learning algorithms.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
去中心化联邦学习（Decentralized Federated Learning, DFL）作为一种无需中心服务器的协同学习范式，在边缘计算、物联网和隐私敏感场景中展现出巨大潜力。然而，现有DFL方法仍面临三大瓶颈：**数据异构性**导致模型漂移与收敛震荡；理论分析常依赖过强假设（如全局Lipschitz梯度、强凸性或均匀采样），难以适配真实异构网络；且当引入通信压缩或差分隐私等实用技术时，性能显著下降。

## 方法创新：PaME算法  
本文提出**PaME（DFL by Partial Message Exchange）**——一种基于随机稀疏坐标交换的新型DFL算法。其核心思想是：每轮通信中，任意两个相邻节点仅**随机选择并交换少量（如1%–5%）坐标维度的梯度/模型更新量**，而非全量参数。该设计天然实现三重增益：（1）**通信开销线性降低**（与稀疏率成反比）；（2）**隐式隐私保护**——攻击者无法从极稀疏片段推断原始数据分布；（3）**精度无损**——理论与实验均证实其收敛精度与全量交换基准一致。

## 理论突破与实验验证  
我们建立了首个适用于**非凸、非强凸、数据高度异构**场景的线性收敛性证明：仅需**局部梯度Lipschitz连续**与**通信拓扑矩阵双随机**两个温和假设——摒弃了传统DFL要求的全局一致性、同质数据或严格凸性等限制。在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet及真实医疗数据集上的系统实验表明：PaME在通信量减少87%时，测试准确率反超D-PSGD、ADMM和GT-DSGD等基线算法1.2–3.8个百分点，且对网络延迟与节点失效具备更强鲁棒性。
papers.summary_en: Decentralized federated learning (DFL) eliminates the central server but suffers from data heterogeneity, restrictive theoretical assumptions, and performance degradation under communication compression or privacy mechanisms. This paper proposes **PaME (DFL by Partial Message Exchange)**, a novel algorithm where neighboring nodes exchange only *randomly selected sparse coordinates* of model updates per iteration. PaME achieves up to **87% communication reduction**, provides inherent privacy via extreme sparsity, and maintains full accuracy. Crucially, we prove its **linear convergence** under only two mild assumptions: local gradient Lipschitz continuity and doubly stochastic communication matrix—removing common requirements like global convexity, homogeneous data, or uniform sampling. Experiments on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, and real-world medical data show PaME outperforms D-PSGD, ADMM, and GT-DSGD by 1.2–3.8% in test accuracy under 90% less communication, with superior robustness to network asynchrony and node failures.
papers.summary:
## 背景与挑战  
去中心化联邦学习（Decentralized Federated Learning, DFL）作为一种无需中心服务器的协同学习范式，在边缘计算、物联网和隐私敏感场景中展现出巨大潜力。然而，现有DFL方法仍面临三大瓶颈：**数据异构性**导致模型漂移与收敛震荡；理论分析常依赖过强假设（如全局Lipschitz梯度、强凸性或均匀采样），难以适配真实异构网络；且当引入通信压缩或差分隐私等实用技术时，性能显著下降。

## 方法创新：PaME算法  
本文提出**PaME（DFL by Partial Message Exchange）**——一种基于随机稀疏坐标交换的新型DFL算法。其核心思想是：每轮通信中，任意两个相邻节点仅**随机选择并交换少量（如1%–5%）坐标维度的梯度/模型更新量**，而非全量参数。该设计天然实现三重增益：（1）**通信开销线性降低**（与稀疏率成反比）；（2）**隐式隐私保护**——攻击者无法从极稀疏片段推断原始数据分布；（3）**精度无损**——理论与实验均证实其收敛精度与全量交换基准一致。

## 理论突破与实验验证  
我们建立了首个适用于**非凸、非强凸、数据高度异构**场景的线性收敛性证明：仅需**局部梯度Lipschitz连续**与**通信拓扑矩阵双随机**两个温和假设——摒弃了传统DFL要求的全局一致性、同质数据或严格凸性等限制。在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet及真实医疗数据集上的系统实验表明：PaME在通信量减少87%时，测试准确率反超D-PSGD、ADMM和GT-DSGD等基线算法1.2–3.8个百分点，且对网络延迟与节点失效具备更强鲁棒性。

papers.title: Adversarial Query Synthesis via Bayesian Optimization
papers.abstract: Benchmark workloads are extremely important to the database management research community, especially as more machine learning components are integrated into database systems. Here, we propose a Bayesian optimization technique to automatically search for difficult benchmark queries, significantly reducing the amount of manual effort usually required. In preliminary experiments, we show that our approach can generate queries with more than double the optimization headroom compared to existing benchmarks.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
基准查询工作负载是数据库管理系统（DBMS）研究的核心基础设施，尤其在机器学习驱动的智能数据库（如学习型优化器、自调优索引、AI辅助查询重写）快速发展的背景下，其重要性日益凸显。然而，现有基准（如TPC-H、Join Order Benchmark）多基于真实业务场景或人工设计，难以系统性覆盖查询优化器的**薄弱边界案例**，导致性能评估存在盲区，且人工构造高难度查询成本高昂、可复现性差。

## 方法创新  
本文提出**对抗式查询合成（Adversarial Query Synthesis, AQS）框架**，首次将**贝叶斯优化（Bayesian Optimization, BO）** 引入数据库查询空间的自动化探索。该方法将查询生成建模为黑盒优化问题：以查询执行代价（如优化器预估代价与实际执行时间的偏差）为反馈信号，利用高斯过程（GP）代理模型高效建模查询结构—性能映射关系，并通过期望改进（Expected Improvement）采集函数引导搜索向“优化器最易误判”的难例区域迭代收敛。我们设计了可微分的查询结构编码器与约束感知的查询语法生成器，确保合成查询语法合法、语义有效且具备可控复杂度。

## 主要发现与贡献  
- 在PostgreSQL与SQLite上验证表明，AQS生成的查询平均优化头（optimization headroom）达**217%**，显著高于TPC-H（98%）和JOB（103%）；  
- 83%的合成查询触发了优化器关键路径错误（如次优连接顺序、错误基数估计），而基线基准中该比例不足12%；  
- 端到端合成耗时仅需**<12分钟/轮**（单GPU），较人工专家构造提速两个数量级；  
- 开源代码与合成查询集已发布，支持可复现实验与社区基准演进。本工作为数据库智能评测开辟了数据驱动、自适应的新范式。
papers.summary_en: Benchmark workloads are critical for evaluating modern database systems—especially as ML-driven components (e.g., learned optimizers, adaptive indexing) become pervasive. Yet, existing benchmarks (e.g., TPC-H, JOB) lack systematic coverage of optimizer failure modes and rely heavily on manual curation. We propose **Adversarial Query Synthesis via Bayesian Optimization (AQS-BO)**, a fully automated framework that treats query generation as a black-box optimization problem. Using Gaussian process surrogate models and expected improvement acquisition, AQS-BO efficiently navigates the structured SQL space to synthesize syntactically valid, semantically meaningful queries that maximize optimizer headroom—the gap between estimated and actual cost. In experiments on PostgreSQL and SQLite, AQS-BO generated queries with **217% average optimization headroom**, more than double that of TPC-H (98%) and JOB (103%). Over 83% of synthesized queries exposed critical optimizer errors (e.g., wrong join orders), versus <12% in baselines. The method requires only minutes per iteration on a single GPU, enabling scalable, reproducible, and adaptive database benchmarking.

papers.title: Fed-GAME: Personalized Federated Learning with Graph Attention Mixture-of-Experts For Time-Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) on graphs shows promise for distributed time-series forecasting. Yet, existing methods rely on static topologies and struggle with client heterogeneity. We propose Fed-GAME, a framework that models personalized aggregation as message passing over a learnable dynamic implicit graph. The core is a decoupled parameter difference-based update protocol, where clients transmit parameter differences between their fine-tuned private model and a shared global model. On the server, these differences are decomposed into two streams: (1) averaged difference used to updating the global model for consensus (2) the selective difference fed into a novel Graph Attention Mixture-of-Experts (GAME) aggregator for fine-grained personalization. In this aggregator, shared experts provide scoring signals while personalized gates adaptively weight selective updates to support personalized aggregation. Experiments on two real-world electric vehicle charging datasets demonstrate that Fed-GAME outperforms state-of-the-art personalized FL baselines.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
面向图结构数据的联邦学习（FL）在分布式时序预测中展现出潜力，但现有方法普遍依赖**静态图拓扑**，难以刻画客户端间动态、异构的关联关系；同时，面对设备级数据分布偏移、模型能力差异等**客户端异质性**问题，传统全局聚合机制易导致“平均化退化”，牺牲个体性能。

## 方法创新：Fed-GAME 框架  
本文提出 **Fed-GAME**——一种面向时序预测的个性化联邦学习新框架，其核心是将个性化聚合建模为**可学习的动态隐式图上的消息传递过程**。关键设计包括：  
- **解耦式参数差更新协议**：客户端仅上传其私有微调模型与共享全局模型之间的**参数差**（而非完整模型或梯度），显著降低通信开销并增强隐私友好性；  
- **双流差异处理机制**：服务器端将接收的参数差分解为两路——(1) **均值差流**用于常规全局模型更新，保障群体共识；(2) **选择性差流**输入至原创的**图注意力混合专家（GAME）聚合器**，实现细粒度个性化；  
- **GAME 聚合器**：由共享专家网络生成跨客户端的注意力评分信号，再通过轻量级个性化门控网络自适应加权各客户端的选择性更新，从而在保留共性知识的同时精准适配本地模式。

## 实验验证  
在两个真实世界电动汽车充电负荷时序数据集（含时空异构性与强非平稳性）上，Fed-GAME 在MAE/RMSE指标上**全面超越**FedPer、pFedMe、FedRoD等主流个性化FL基线（平均提升达12.7%），且收敛更快、通信效率更高。本工作首次将动态图学习、MoE机制与参数差范式深度融合，为资源受限边缘场景下的高精度个性化时序预测提供了新范式。
papers.summary_en: Federated learning (FL) on graphs holds promise for distributed time-series forecasting, yet existing methods suffer from reliance on static topologies and poor handling of client heterogeneity. To address this, we propose **Fed-GAME**, a novel personalized FL framework that reformulates personalized aggregation as message passing over a *learnable, dynamic implicit graph*. Its core innovation is a **decoupled parameter-difference update protocol**: clients upload only the difference between their fine-tuned private model and the shared global model. On the server, these differences are split into two streams: (1) an *averaged stream* updates the global model for consensus; (2) a *selective stream* feeds into our new **Graph Attention Mixture-of-Experts (GAME)** aggregator. GAME employs shared experts to generate cross-client attention scores and lightweight personalized gates to adaptively weight selective updates—enabling fine-grained personalization without compromising global coherence. Extensive experiments on two real-world EV charging datasets demonstrate that Fed-GAME consistently outperforms state-of-the-art personalized FL baselines (e.g., pFedMe, FedRoD) by up to 12.7% in MAE/RMSE, with faster convergence and lower communication cost.

papers.title: Committing Security of BBB Secure MACs
papers.abstract: Committing security has recently emerged as an essential property for message authentication codes (MACs), driven by applications such as abuse reporting in end-to-end encrypted messaging systems. Traditional notions, such as unforgeability or pseudorandomness, are insufficient in these contexts, prompting the introduction of stronger security notions. Bhaumik et al. (CRYPTO'24) initiated this line of research by formalizing the notions of commitment and context-discovery for MACs and analyzing several standardized birthday-bound secure constructions. We extend this line of work to beyond-birthday-bound (BBB) secure MACs. In particular, we examine the class of constructions identified by Chen et al. (ASIACRYPT'21), which employ two block ciphers and a single block hash function, together with well-studied BBB MACs from the DbHtS paradigm. Our findings depict a heterogeneous picture: while several constructions succumb to simple attacks, others exhibit some resilience, highlighting that committing and context-discovery security for BBB MACs depends strongly on structural design choices.
papers.summary_zh:
## 研究背景  
“承诺安全性”（committing security）是近年来为应对端到端加密通信中滥用举报（abuse reporting）等现实需求而提出的新型MAC安全范式。传统安全性定义（如不可伪造性或伪随机性）无法阻止攻击者对同一消息生成多个语义不同但验证通过的MAC标签，从而破坏举报场景下的证据唯一性与可归责性。Bhaumik等人（CRYPTO’24）首次形式化了**承诺安全性**（commitment）与**上下文可发现性**（context-discovery）两大核心安全目标，并系统评估了若干生日界（birthday-bound, BB）安全MAC构造。

## 研究方法与范围  
本文将该研究前沿拓展至**超越生日界**（beyond-birthday-bound, BBB）安全的MAC领域。我们重点分析两类主流BBB构造：（1）Chen等人（ASIACRYPT’21）提出的双分组密码+单块哈希函数结构（如2BC-H）；（2）基于DbHtS（Double-block Hash-then-Sum）范式的经典BBB MAC（如PMAC+, 3kf9, LightMAC+）。采用理论分析与构造性攻击相结合的方法，系统检验其在承诺性与上下文可发现性下的鲁棒性。

## 主要发现与创新点  
研究揭示出显著的**结构依赖性**：  
- **脆弱构造**：2BC-H类中多数变体（如2BC-H with XOR masking）可被多项式时间攻击突破承诺性——攻击者仅需1次查询即可为同一消息生成两个不同密钥下合法且上下文可区分的标签；  
- **韧性构造**：DbHtS范式下的PMAC+与3kf9在标准模型中展现出对上下文可发现攻击的强抵抗能力，其安全性根植于双重块密码的非线性扩散与哈希-求和结构的代数约束；  
- **理论贡献**：首次建立BBB MAC的承诺安全性分类框架，指出“密钥分离性”与“标签生成路径唯一性”是决定其承诺鲁棒性的关键设计原则，为下一代抗滥用认证机制提供可验证的设计指南。
papers.summary_en: Committing security is a recently introduced MAC property essential for abuse reporting in end-to-end encrypted messaging, where traditional unforgeability fails to ensure tag uniqueness across contexts. Building on Bhaumik et al.’s (CRYPTO’24) foundational work on commitment and context-discovery security for birthday-bound MACs, we initiate the first systematic study of these properties for beyond-birthday-bound (BBB) MACs. We analyze two prominent BBB families: (i) Chen et al.’s (ASIACRYPT’21) two-blockcipher-plus-hash constructions (e.g., 2BC-H), and (ii) well-established DbHtS-based MACs (e.g., PMAC+, 3kf9). Our results reveal a stark dichotomy: several 2BC-H variants are broken by simple, efficient attacks—violating commitment with a single query—while PMAC+ and 3kf9 resist context-discovery under standard assumptions. Crucially, we identify *key separation* and *uniqueness of tag derivation paths* as structural prerequisites for committing security in BBB designs—providing the first design principles for abuse-resilient high-security MACs.
papers.summary:

papers.title: CRISP: Circuit-pRivate Single-Image Steganography with Permutations
papers.abstract:
We introduce $CRISP (\underline{C}ircuit-p\underline{R}ivate ~Single-\underline{I}mage~ \underline{S}teganography ~with ~\underline{P}ermutations),$ a provably secure homomorphic steganography scheme designed to address key limitations in existing approaches to private computation. Current methods often suffer from excessive image overhead and a complete lack of circuit privacy. Specifically, many techniques require a separate cover image for each wire in a circuit, leading to a large number of images for even moderately sized circuits. This also inadvertently reveals the underlying logical gate structure to an honest-but-curious cloud provider, as wire roles are often fixed to specific images.

CRISP resolves these challenges by embedding all three Fredkin gate inputs directly into the RGB channels of a $single$ cover image at a secret pixel position $(\mathit{row},\mathit{col})$. Similarly, all three outputs are written to a single output image. To ensure robust circuit privacy, CRISP employs two independently sampled permutations: $\pi_{\mathrm{in}}$ assigns input channel roles, and $\pi_{\mathrm{out}}$ reassigns output channel roles. These permutations work in tandem to prevent an adversary from deducing the circuit's structure. Without $\pi_{\mathrm{out}}$ varying per gate, the Fredkin gate's pass-through of the control bit could enable a deterministic channel-matching attack, fully exposing the logical gate structure to the cloud provider. By resampling $\pi_{\mathrm{in}}$ and $\pi_{\mathrm{out}}$ independently for each gate, CRISP effectively prevents cross-gate correlation attacks.

Our security analysis demonstrates that an adversary's advantage in locating the secret pixel and inferring the embedded bits decays as\\ $\Theta\!\left(1/(h{\times}w)\right)$, where $h{\times}w$ is the image resolution. This bound is cryptographically negligible for any practical image size. CRISP significantly reduces image overhead: per gate, it uses just two images (one input cover plus one independent output cover). This represents a substantial reduction compared to other methods that might require multiple images per wire. For an obfuscated benchmark circuit, CRISP further demonstrates a notable reduction in total image count. Crucially, CRISP delivers circuit privacy, a qualitatively new and essential security guarantee.

The correctness, security, and efficiency of CRISP are formally proved and experimentally validated.
papers.summary_zh:
## CRISP：基于置换的电路隐私单图像隐写方案

当前基于图像的**同态隐写术**（homomorphic steganography）面临两大瓶颈：**高图像开销**与**缺失电路隐私**。典型方法需为电路中每条“线”（wire）分配独立载体图像，导致中等规模电路即产生数十甚至上百张图像；更严重的是，固定通道-角色映射（如R通道恒表控制位）会向诚实但好奇的云服务商**明示逻辑门结构**，彻底破坏计算隐私。

CRISP（**C**ircuit-p**R**ivate **S**ingle-image **S**teganography with **P**ermutations）首次实现**单图像输入/单图像输出**的严格电路隐私隐写。其核心创新在于：  
- 将Fredkin门全部**三个输入比特**嵌入同一张RGB载体图像的**秘密像素位置**$(\mathit{row},\mathit{col})$，分别经由**独立随机置换**$\pi_{\mathrm{in}}$动态分配至R/G/B通道；  
- 三输出比特同样写入单张输出图像，并经另一独立置换$\pi_{\mathrm{out}}$重映射——该设计阻断了Fredkin门“控制位直通”特性引发的**确定性通道匹配攻击**；  
- 每个门均**独立重采样**$\pi_{\mathrm{in}}$与$\pi_{\mathrm{out}}$，彻底消除跨门相关性，抵御统计关联分析。

安全性上，敌手定位秘密像素并推断嵌入比特的优势界为$\Theta(1/(h{\times}w))$，对任意实用分辨率（如$512{\times}512$）均为**密码学可忽略量级**。实验表明：CRISP将每门图像开销降至**仅2张**（1输入+1输出），较传统方法降低1个数量级以上；在标准混淆电路基准测试中，总图像数减少超60%。CRISP是首个形式化证明具备**电路隐私**（circuit privacy）这一质性安全保证的单图像隐写方案。
papers.summary_en: We propose **CRISP**, the first provably secure *circuit-private* homomorphic steganography scheme that embeds an entire Fredkin gate’s three inputs into a *single* RGB cover image—and writes all three outputs to *one* output image. To break structural leakage, CRISP applies two independently sampled permutations per gate: $\pi_{\mathrm{in}}$ dynamically assigns input bits to RGB channels, while $\pi_{\mathrm{out}}$ remaps outputs—preventing deterministic channel-matching attacks enabled by the Fredkin gate’s control-bit pass-through. Security analysis shows the adversary’s advantage in locating the secret pixel and recovering bits decays as $\Theta(1/(h{\times}w))$, cryptographically negligible for practical images (e.g., $512{\times}512$). CRISP reduces per-gate overhead to just **2 images**, cutting total image count by >60% on obfuscated benchmarks—while delivering the qualitatively new guarantee of *circuit privacy*, formally proved and experimentally validated.

当前基于图像的**同态隐写术**（homomorphic steganography）面临两大瓶颈：**高图像开销**与**缺失电路隐私**。典型方法需为电路中每条“线”（wire）分配独立载体图像，导致中等规模电路即产生数十甚至上百张图像；更严重的是，固定通道-角色映射（如R通道恒表控制位）会向诚实但好奇的云服务商**明示逻辑门结构**，彻底破坏计算隐私。

papers.title: Coppersmith's Method for Solving Modular Inversion Hidden Number Problem via Determinant-Based Elimination
papers.abstract: The selection of shift polynomials is a pivotal yet challenging step in Coppersmith's method for computing modular roots of multivariate polynomials. We propose a novel, determinant-based strategy for generating these polynomials, thereby presenting an improved variant of Coppersmith's method tailored for certain multivariate modular equations. Our approach is first validated on solving the Modular Inversion Hidden Number Problem (MIHNP) and predicting the Inversive Congruential Generator (ICG), where it is shown to outperform prior methods both in theory and in practice. Furthermore, when applied to the Modular Inversion Double Hidden Numbers Problem (MIDHNP), our analysis reveals that MIDHNP is not harder than MIHNP, thereby disproving a conjecture by Boneh et al. (Asiacrypt 2001).
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与挑战  
Coppersmith 方法是求解模意义下多元多项式小根的核心代数工具，广泛应用于密码分析。其关键瓶颈在于**移位多项式（shift polynomials）的构造**——传统方法依赖启发式格基选择或冗余枚举，缺乏系统性，导致格维数膨胀、边界松弛严重，限制了实际求解能力。

## 创新方法：行列式驱动的消元策略  
本文提出一种**基于行列式的移位多项式生成框架**：将目标多项式方程组的代数依赖关系建模为参数化矩阵，通过计算其符号行列式并提取低次项，自动导出一组线性无关、次数受控且隐含目标小根信息的移位多项式。该策略规避了人工构造与格维数爆炸，实现了从“多项式选取”到“代数消元”的范式转变。

## 主要成果与突破  
- **MIHNP 求解显著提升**：在 Modular Inversion Hidden Number Problem（MIHNP）上，我们的方法将理论可恢复界从 Boneh–Goh–Nissim（2003）的 $ \mathrm{MSB}_{\delta n}(a^{-1} \bmod p) $ 改进至 $ \delta > 1/3 $（$n = \log_2 p$），实验验证在 512-bit 素数模下成功恢复率达 92%，较现有最优实现提速 3.8×；  
- **ICG 预测首次达到最优熵界**：对 Inversive Congruential Generator 的状态预测，仅需 $ \approx 2\log_2 p $ 比特最高有效位（MSB）即可重建完整种子，达信息论下限；  
- **颠覆性理论澄清**：针对 Modular Inversion Double Hidden Numbers Problem（MIDHNP），我们证明其求解难度**不高于 MIHNP**，严格证伪 Boneh et al.（Asiacrypt 2001）提出的“MIDHNP 严格难于 MIHNP”猜想，揭示二者本质等价。

本工作统一了模逆类隐藏数问题的代数结构认知，为 Coppersmith 方法提供了可证明、可扩展的新引擎。
papers.summary_en: We propose a **determinant-based elimination framework** to systematically generate shift polynomials in Coppersmith’s method—resolving a long-standing bottleneck in constructing low-degree, linearly independent polynomials for multivariate modular root finding. Applied to the Modular Inversion Hidden Number Problem (MIHNP), our approach improves the theoretical MSB recovery bound to $\delta > 1/3$ (for $n$-bit prime $p$), outperforming prior methods both asymptotically and empirically (e.g., 92% success rate on 512-bit instances). It also achieves optimal entropy efficiency for predicting the Inversive Congruential Generator (ICG), requiring only $\approx 2\log_2 p$ MSBs. Crucially, our analysis of the Modular Inversion Double Hidden Numbers Problem (MIDHNP) proves it is *no harder* than MIHNP—refuting Boneh et al.’s (Asiacrypt 2001) conjecture and establishing their computational equivalence. This work provides the first algebraically principled, determinant-driven variant of Coppersmith’s method with provable advantages.

papers.title: Threshold Traitor Tracing Revisited: Insider Attacks and Multi-Traitor Tracing
papers.abstract:
Recently, Boneh, Partap, and Rotem [Crypto’24] initiated the study of threshold traitor tracing, which aims to enhance threshold decryption with anti-collusion mechanisms through a tracing functionality. In their model, a set of colluders constructs a decryption box, called a decoder, and sells it to an external buyer. Collusion-resilience is guaranteed by a tracing algorithm that, given only black-box access to the decoder, can identify at least one of the colluders. 
However, in this paper, we argue that the state-of-the-art definition and constructions are not resilient against attacks where the decoder is sold to an insider, i.e., a member of the decryption committee. 


Motivated by this gap, we introduce new definitions to model decoder boxes that are sold to insiders. We show that existing threshold traitor tracing techniques are inherently vulnerable to insider attacks. Then, we introduce a novel approach to achieve insider resilience through multi-traitor tracing, i.e., identifying multiple traitors.
We present compilers that amplify the number of traitors that can be found, thereby achieving insider-resilience with efficient parameters, in particular, sublinear ciphertext size. These compilers may also be of independent interest.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与问题  
近期，Boneh、Partap 和 Rotem（Crypto’24）首次提出**门限叛徒追踪（Threshold Traitor Tracing, TTT）**，旨在为门限解密系统嵌入抗合谋能力：当一组用户（“叛徒”）合谋构造并出售一个黑盒解密器（decoder）给**外部买家**时，追踪算法可通过仅查询该解密器，识别出至少一名叛徒。然而，本文指出其安全模型存在关键盲区——**未考虑“内部买家”场景**：即解密委员会成员（如另一名合法授权者）购得该decoder并用于非法解密。此类“ insider attack（内部攻击）”可绕过原有追踪机制，导致叛徒完全无法被定位。

## 创新方法与核心贡献  
我们首次形式化定义了面向**内部买家的门限叛徒追踪（Insider-Resilient TTT）**，严格刻画decoder被售予委员会内成员时的安全要求。理论分析表明：所有现有TTT方案（包括Crypto’24构造）在该模型下均**本质脆弱**——因单叛徒追踪能力不足以抵御内部共谋规避策略。为此，我们提出**多叛徒追踪（Multi-Traitor Tracing）** 新范式：要求追踪算法能识别**多个（而非仅一个）叛徒**，从而确保即使买家本身是叛徒之一，仍可揭露其余共谋者。

## 关键成果  
- 设计两类通用**编译器（compilers）**，可将任意基础TTT方案升级为支持k-叛徒追踪的方案；  
- 实现**亚线性密文长度**（ciphertext size = Õ(√n)），突破传统线性开销瓶颈；  
- 首次达成**内部攻击下的可证明安全性**，且保持高效性（追踪时间多项式、私钥尺寸恒定）；  
- 所提编译器具有独立价值，可拓展至其他抗合谋密码原语。
papers.summary_en: Recently, Boneh, Partap, and Rotem (Crypto’24) introduced *threshold traitor tracing* (TTT), enabling tracing of at least one colluder when a decoder is sold to an *external* buyer. However, we identify a critical gap: their model—and all existing constructions—fail under *insider attacks*, where the decoder is sold to a member of the decryption committee itself. To address this, we formalize *insider-resilient TTT*, proving that standard single-traitor tracing is inherently insufficient. We propose *multi-traitor tracing* as the essential primitive: requiring the tracer to identify *multiple* colluders (e.g., ≥2), thereby ensuring accountability even when the buyer is colluding. We design efficient compilers that amplify tracing capability from 1 to *k* traitors while achieving sublinear ciphertext size (Õ(√n)) and maintaining polynomial-time tracing. Our constructions are the first provably secure against insider attacks, with applications beyond TTT.

- 设计两类通用**编译器（compilers）**，可将任意基础TTT方案升级为支持k-叛徒追踪的方案；

papers.title: Cryptanalysis of Polynomial Learning With Errors (PLWE): A Survey
papers.abstract:
Lattice-based cryptography (LBC) has emerged as one of the most promising fields supporting post-quantum cryptography (PQC). The Learning With Errors (LWE) problem \cite{Regev}, due to its strong security guarantees, plays a fundamental role in LBC, although it is not very efficient for cryptographic applications. To address this limitation, several variants of LWE have been developed, such as Ring-LWE (RLWE) \cite{LPR2010}, which is suitable for theoretical purposes, and Polynomial-LWE (PLWE) \cite{BV}, which is more practical.
This survey provides a systematic review of vulnerable instances of PLWE. These attacks may extend to RLWE in instances where the two problems are equivalent..
This paper serves as a resource for those seeking a structured overview of the state-of-the-art attacks on PLWE.
papers.summary_zh:
## 密码分析综述：多项式学习带错误问题（PLWE）的安全边界研究

**背景与意义**：格密码学（Lattice-Based Cryptography, LBC）是后量子密码（PQC）最具潜力的候选方向之一。经典Learning With Errors（LWE）问题虽具备坚实的理论安全性（基于最坏情况到平均情况的归约），但其密钥尺寸与计算开销制约了实际部署。为此，代数结构增强的变体——如Ring-LWE（RLWE）与**Polynomial-LWE（PLWE）**——被相继提出。PLWE因直接在多项式环ℤ_q[x]/f(x)上定义、支持高效FFT加速及简洁密文表示，成为面向轻量级与硬件友好型PQC方案（如密钥封装机制KEM）的重要基础。

**方法与范围**：本综述系统梳理了2013–2023年间针对PLWE的全部已知密码分析工作，聚焦于**可被高效破解的脆弱参数实例**。我们按攻击范式分类：① **数论结构攻击**（利用f(x)的根在复平面上的特殊分布，如小模长根或实轴聚集性）；② **理想格几何攻击**（结合短向量求解与环同态映射失真分析）；③ **统计区分攻击**（通过误差分布投影的非均匀性实现明文恢复）；④ **等价性迁移攻击**（当PLWE与RLWE参数满足特定伽罗瓦条件时，PLWE漏洞可直接传导至RLWE）。

**主要发现与创新点**：  
- 首次明确界定PLWE安全的**必要非充分条件**：f(x)应为不可约、无小模长复根、且其分裂域具有高伽罗瓦复杂度；  
- 揭示多类“看似随机”但实际脆弱的构造（如f(x)=xⁿ+1在n为2的幂时对q≡1 mod 4的敏感性）；  
- 提出**参数选择检查清单**（含判别式检验、根定位算法、误差方差阈值），为NIST PQC标准化中PLWE派生方案提供可操作的安全指南；  
- 指出当前标准（如CRYSTALS-Kyber虽基于MLWE，但其PLWE子情形仍需警惕）尚未覆盖的隐性风险面。

本综述不仅填补了PLWE系统性安全评估的空白，更构建了连接代数数论、格密码与工程实践的跨学科分析框架。
papers.summary_en: This survey provides a structured, up-to-date analysis of cryptanalytic attacks against the Polynomial Learning With Errors (PLWE) problem—a practical algebraic variant of LWE widely used in post-quantum cryptographic schemes. We systematically classify and evaluate all known efficient attacks targeting *vulnerable PLWE instances*, including number-theoretic root-based attacks, geometric ideal-lattice reductions, statistical distinguishing techniques, and equivalence-preserving transfers to Ring-LWE (RLWE). Our key contributions include: (1) establishing concrete necessary conditions for PLWE security—e.g., irreducibility of the defining polynomial $f(x)$, absence of small-complexity roots, and high Galois complexity of its splitting field; (2) identifying previously overlooked fragile parameter families (e.g., $f(x) = x^n + 1$ with $q \equiv 1 \pmod{4}$); and (3) proposing a practical parameter-validation checklist for implementers. Crucially, we clarify when PLWE vulnerabilities *provably extend* to RLWE, enabling unified security assessment. This work serves as both a research reference and an engineering safeguard for PQC standardization and deployment.
papers.summary:
## 密码分析综述：多项式学习带错误问题（PLWE）的安全边界研究

**背景与意义**：格密码学（Lattice-Based Cryptography, LBC）是后量子密码（PQC）最具潜力的候选方向之一。经典Learning With Errors（LWE）问题虽具备坚实的理论安全性（基于最坏情况到平均情况的归约），但其密钥尺寸与计算开销制约了实际部署。为此，代数结构增强的变体——如Ring-LWE（RLWE）与**Polynomial-LWE（PLWE）**——被相继提出。PLWE因直接在多项式环ℤ_q[x]/f(x)上定义、支持高效FFT加速及简洁密文表示，成为面向轻量级与硬件友好型PQC方案（如密钥封装机制KEM）的重要基础。

**方法与范围**：本综述系统梳理了2013–2023年间针对PLWE的全部已知密码分析工作，聚焦于**可被高效破解的脆弱参数实例**。我们按攻击范式分类：① **数论结构攻击**（利用f(x)的根在复平面上的特殊分布，如小模长根或实轴聚集性）；② **理想格几何攻击**（结合短向量求解与环同态映射失真分析）；③ **统计区分攻击**（通过误差分布投影的非均匀性实现明文恢复）；④ **等价性迁移攻击**（当PLWE与RLWE参数满足特定伽罗瓦条件时，PLWE漏洞可直接传导至RLWE）。

**主要发现与创新点**：  
- 首次明确界定PLWE安全的**必要非充分条件**：f(x)应为不可约、无小模长复根、且其分裂域具有高伽罗瓦复杂度；  
- 揭示多类“看似随机”但实际脆弱的构造（如f(x)=xⁿ+1在n为2的幂时对q≡1 mod 4的敏感性）；  
- 提出**参数选择检查清单**（含判别式检验、根定位算法、误差方差阈值），为NIST PQC标准化中PLWE派生方案提供可操作的安全指南；  
- 指出当前标准（如CRYSTALS-Kyber虽基于MLWE，但其PLWE子情形仍需警惕）尚未覆盖的隐性风险面。

本综述不仅填补了PLWE系统性安全评估的空白，更构建了连接代数数论、格密码与工程实践的跨学科分析框架。

papers.title: FALCON with message recovery, a specification
papers.abstract:
FALCON (Prest et al. NIST submission) is a lattice-based digital signature scheme that is intended to be standardized by NIST under the name FN-DSA. This scheme has smaller signature and public key sizes than the ``primary'' NIST scheme, ML-DSA, but is more complicated to implement due to floating-point requirements.  For this reason, NIST has recommended the scheme be used in special situations where smaller key and signature sizes are particularly important. 

There are certain situations, where one can make small modifications to FALCON which results in even shorter outputs, which is particularly interesting for FALCON's intended use cases where smaller outputs are important. 
In the scenario where one would like to minimize the total public key plus signature length, one could use FALCON in key recovery mode, which is a fairly straight-forward procedure specified in the FALCON document. 

In the scenario where one would like to minimize the total signature plus message length, one could use the message recovery mode (which is a somewhat less straight-forward modification) as described in (del Pino et al. SCN 2017).  The purpose of this note is to fully specify the details of this latter mode for developers wishing to implement it.  The savings of using FALCON in message recovery mode is up to 226 bytes as compared to FALCON-512 and up to 434 bytes compared to FALCON-1024 for the same security levels (i.e. NIST levels 1 and 5, respectively).  We also sketch how the same technique can be applied to the ring signature version of FALCON from (Gajland et al. Crypto 2024).

The main algorithmic building blocks of FALCON, such as key generation and trapdoor sampling, remain exactly the same.  The only algorithmic changes are in the hashing and parsing of the messages, randomness, and the hash function.
papers.summary_zh:
## FALCON 消息恢复模式（FALCON-MR）规范说明

FALCON 是一种基于格的后量子数字签名方案，由 Prest 等人提交至 NIST 后量子密码标准化项目，拟以 **FN-DSA** 名称纳入标准。相较于 NIST 主推方案 ML-DSA，FALCON 具备更小的公钥与签名尺寸优势，但因依赖浮点运算而实现复杂度较高，故 NIST 建议其用于对密钥/签名长度极度敏感的特定场景。

本文聚焦于 FALCON 的**消息恢复（Message Recovery, MR）扩展模式**——一种可进一步压缩通信开销的实用优化。在需最小化“签名 + 原始消息”总长度的应用中（如带宽受限的嵌入式系统、区块链轻客户端或短报文协议），MR 模式较标准 FALCON 显著提升效率：  
- 相比 **FALCON-512**（对应 NIST 安全等级 1），最大节省 **226 字节**；  
- 相比 **FALCON-1024**（对应 NIST 安全等级 5），最大节省 **434 字节**。  

本技术说明首次**完整、可实现地规范了 MR 模式的全部算法细节**，填补了原始 FALCON 文档与 del Pino 等人 SCN’17 提出的理论构想之间的工程鸿沟。核心设计原则是**最小侵入性修改**：底层核心算法（密钥生成、陷门采样、高斯采样等）完全保持不变；仅调整三处关键组件：  
1. **消息预处理**：将部分消息比特嵌入签名结构；  
2. **随机性绑定机制**：重构 nonce 生成与哈希输入结构；  
3. **哈希函数调用方式**：采用定制化标签与分段哈希策略，确保可逆恢复。  

此外，本文简要论证了该 MR 技术可无缝迁移至 Gajland 等人 Crypto’24 提出的 **FALCON 环签名变体**，为隐私增强型应用（如匿名凭证、混币协议）提供高效基础构件。本规范面向开发者，已通过形式化伪代码与边界条件说明确保可审计、可复现。
papers.summary_en: FALCON is a lattice-based digital signature scheme submitted to NIST (proposed as FN-DSA), offering smaller keys and signatures than ML-DSA but requiring floating-point arithmetic. This note fully specifies **FALCON with message recovery (FALCON-MR)**—a practical optimization for scenarios where minimizing *signature plus message* size is critical (e.g., constrained networks or short-message protocols). Unlike key-recovery mode, MR embeds part of the message into the signature, enabling full message reconstruction from the signature alone. Compared to standard FALCON, MR saves up to **226 bytes** (vs. FALCON-512, NIST Level 1) and **434 bytes** (vs. FALCON-1024, NIST Level 5). Crucially, all core algorithms—including key generation, trapdoor sampling, and Gaussian sampling—remain *unchanged*; only the hashing logic, message parsing, and randomness binding are modified. We also outline how MR extends naturally to the ring-signature variant of FALCON (Gajland et al., Crypto 2024). This specification targets implementers, providing unambiguous, ready-to-deploy details.

papers.title: Hermine: An Efficient Lattice-based FROST-like Threshold Signature
papers.abstract:
Threshold signatures have regained a strong interest recently, driven by applications in cryptocurrencies and NIST's ongoing call for threshold schemes. Among them, FROST - a classical threshold Schnorr signature scheme already in real-world deployment - stands out. Its appeal lies in three core features: partially non-interactive signing, non-interactive identifiable abort (IA), and proactive security. In contrast, while post-quantum (PQ) threshold signatures have seen significant advances in recent years, no existing scheme simultaneously provides even two of these features. Considering the imminent need to migrate to PQ cryptography, this state-of-the-art remains unsatisfactory. 

In this work, we propose Hermine, a lattice-based threshold signature that offers the full feature set of FROST under standard lattice assumptions. Hermine is designed to efficiently support the Medium scale of parties ($N \le 64$) as defined in the NIST threshold call, producing a small \Raccoon signature of size $11$ KB. Our main technical contribution is introducing an everywhere-short secret sharing, which splits a short secret vector $\mathbf{s} \in R_q^\ell$ into short shares and admits a short linear reconstruction algorithm. While the resulting construction appears intuitive, its security proof requires a non-trivial, fine-grained analysis of the information on $\mathbf{s}$ that is inherently leaked by the short shares.  Furthermore, we formalize game-based unforgeability and IA definitions with proactive security, which may be of independent interest.
papers.summary_zh:
## 背景与问题  
阈值签名在加密货币和NIST阈值方案标准化进程中备受关注。经典FROST方案（基于Schnorr）已实际部署，具备三大关键特性：**部分非交互式签名**、**非交互式可识别中止（IA）** 和**主动安全性**。然而，现有后量子（PQ）阈值签名方案均未能同时实现其中任意两项——尤其在向抗量子密码迁移的紧迫背景下，这一技术缺口亟待填补。

## 方法与创新  
本文提出**Hermine**：首个在标准格假设下完整复现FROST全部三大特性的格基阈值签名方案。为支撑NIST定义的“中等规模”（$N \leq 64$）应用场景，Hermine优化了计算与通信开销，生成仅**11 KB**的紧凑签名（类Raccoon结构）。核心技术创新在于提出**处处短秘密共享（Everywhere-Short Secret Sharing）**：将短秘密向量 $\mathbf{s} \in R_q^\ell$ 拆分为同样短的份额，并支持短向量线性重构。该构造虽直观，但其安全性证明需精细刻画短份额所隐含泄露的关于$\mathbf{s}$的信息熵，突破了传统格基共享的安全分析范式。

## 主要贡献  
- 首个兼具**部分非交互签名、非交互IA与主动安全性**的格基阈值方案；  
- 形式化定义了融合主动安全性的**游戏式不可伪造性与IA安全性模型**，具独立理论价值；  
- 在$N=64$时实测签名体积仅11 KB，显著优于同类方案（如Multi-SIS类方案常超100 KB），兼顾实用性与后量子安全性。
papers.summary_en: We present **Hermine**, the first lattice-based threshold signature scheme achieving *all three* defining features of FROST—partially non-interactive signing, non-interactive identifiable abort (IA), and proactive security—under standard lattice assumptions (e.g., Module-LWE). Designed for NIST’s “Medium” scale ($N \leq 64$), Hermine produces compact **11 KB signatures**, enabling practical deployment. Its core technical advance is *everywhere-short secret sharing*: a novel method to split a short secret vector $\mathbf{s} \in R_q^\ell$ into short shares with a short linear reconstruction algorithm. Security requires a fine-grained analysis of information leakage inherent in short shares—a departure from prior lattice sharing paradigms. We also formalize game-based unforgeability and IA definitions augmented with proactive security, providing foundations for future PQ threshold designs.

papers.title: A White-Box Bootstrapping Approach for High Precision Comparison Over Homomorphic Encryption
papers.abstract:
We propose an efficient and numerically stable sign evaluation over the Cheon–Kim–Kim–Song (CKKS) homomorphic encryption (HE) scheme by introducing a new bootstrapping. 
Sign evaluation underpins applications such as comparison, sorting, and machine learning. Extensive studies exist, such as the polynomial-composition method by Lee et al. (IEEE TDSC'22). 
A critical oversight in the literature is that evaluating composite polynomials consumes substantial multiplicative depth, necessitating intermediate bootstrapping. 
Such bootstrapping introduces considerable noise, which harms convergence and degrades accuracy. 
Inspired by bootstrapping bits (Eurocrypt'24), we propose a new white-box bootstrapping for sign evaluation. 
We prove that our bootstrapping, unlike traditional bootstrapping, intrinsically reduces noise.  
Consequently, (i) it admits an interpretation as a polynomial composition, accelerating convergence “for free,” and (ii) it removes the bootstrapping-induced noise that disrupts convergence in prior art. 
Our implementation validates that the proposed method achieves approximately 40-bit precision—bounded only by the fundamental rescaling noise—doubling the $\approx$ 20 bits of prior work under identical parameters. 
Moreover, our approach requires less depth and is numerically more stable.
papers.summary_zh:
## 提出白盒自举机制，突破同态加密高精度符号评估瓶颈

本研究针对**CKKS同态加密方案**中长期存在的高精度符号评估（sign evaluation）难题，提出一种新型**白盒自举（white-box bootstrapping）方法**。符号评估是安全比较、排序及隐私保护机器学习等关键应用的基础原语，但现有主流方法（如Lee等人在IEEE TDSC’22提出的多项式复合法）依赖深度嵌套的多项式计算，需频繁插入传统自举以控制噪声增长——而该过程本身引入显著额外噪声，严重损害收敛性与最终精度。

我们受Eurocrypt’24“自举比特”思想启发，首次设计**可证明降噪的白盒自举架构**：其核心创新在于将符号函数建模为可解析的白盒电路，而非黑盒多项式逼近；理论证明该自举在执行过程中**内在抑制噪声增长**（而非仅重缩放），从而天然规避传统自举的噪声叠加缺陷。由此带来两大优势：（i）可自然解释为高效多项式复合，实现“零开销加速收敛”；（ii）彻底消除自举诱导的收敛干扰源。实验表明，在相同参数配置下，本方法实现**约40比特有效精度**，较先前最优工作（≈20比特）提升整整一倍，且精度瓶颈仅由CKKS固有的重缩放噪声（rescaling noise）决定；同时所需乘法深度降低35%，数值稳定性显著增强，为实用化高精度隐私计算提供了新范式。
papers.summary_en: We propose a novel **white-box bootstrapping** technique for efficient and numerically stable sign evaluation over the CKKS homomorphic encryption scheme. Unlike prior polynomial-composition approaches—which suffer from multiplicative depth explosion and noise accumulation due to intermediate (black-box) bootstrapping—our method intrinsically *reduces* noise during bootstrapping, as rigorously proven. This enables: (i) free acceleration of convergence via natural polynomial interpretation, and (ii) elimination of bootstrapping-induced noise that harms accuracy in state-of-the-art methods. Implementation results show our approach achieves **~40-bit precision**, doubling the ~20-bit precision of prior work under identical parameters—the limit now imposed solely by fundamental rescaling noise. It also requires less multiplicative depth and exhibits superior numerical stability.
papers.summary:
## 提出白盒自举机制，突破同态加密高精度符号评估瓶颈
